channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas mom's killer received text before murder: "I hope you handle it"
item.description: After Alyssa Burkett was murdered, detectives quickly identified the prime suspect as Andrew Beard, the father of her child. However, the investigation revealed more.

item.title: The Plot to Eliminate Alyssa Burkett
item.description: A toxic couple devises an elaborate plan to kill a mother. Correspondent Peter Van Sant reports for "48 Hours."

item.title: Iran live updates: US plans to use Iranian assets to rebuild Gulf allies, source says
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: After woman's murder, detectives learn killer was "only half the story"
item.description: After Alyssa Burkett was murdered in broad daylight in Carrollton, Texas, Andrew Beard, the father of her child, became a suspect. Investigators later discovered more.
